target: 4. Returning Home
July 24th
*Sigh*... We made it back safely...
Yeah...
(Until we got back here, there was almost no sign of anyone.)
(Though we did hear voices that seemed to be Shadows...)
(Could it be that the people around here have already all been turned into Shadows...)
(...That can't be it, right?)
Dad, I'm home!
Ah, welcome back. You're quite early, how was the festival?
We don't have time for that!
Alain, you're safe! Thank goodness...

Safe? What are you talking about?
Did something happen?
Dad, you don't know anything about the commotion outside!?
No, I was busy cleaning up the shop and prepping for tomorrow, so I don't really know what's going on outside.
This is no time to be saying such carefree things!
(Judging from this, at the very least, there hasn't been a major commotion nearby. It's probably safe to assume that.)
(In any case, I'm really glad Alain is safe...)
Shinpei, what's this commotion? Did an accident happen at the festival or something?
...Alain. I'll give you the short version, so stay calm and listen.
Y-Yeah.
--And that's the situation.
In other words, well... how do I put it. I didn't really understand it, but.
There are terrifying monsters all over the island, so we have to escape off the island?
Yeah, that's right!
But still... I can't just suddenly believe a story like that.
"It's not a joke!"
"I'll take you with us even by force."

It's not a joke!
I'm telling the truth!
Well, there's no way Shinpei would tell a lie like that, so I do think it's probably true.
It's just too big of a... no, too tragic of a story.
To think something like that is happening on this island...
I'll take you with us even by force. We don't have time.
We can talk about it later.
Shin-chan, are you serious?
I'm serious. Even Alain should understand later.
I understand. If Shinpei is going that far, it really must be an emergency.
Then please get ready right away! We're taking the last ferry!
Well, don't panic so much.
Let's all just calm down for a second. Have something warm to drink.
Alain!! Did you not hear what I just said!? I've told you over and over that we need to hurry--
The last ferry today isn't for a while, right?
Huh…?
Oh, right!
Shin-chan, today's the festival. There are a lot more ferries running than usual.
…Oh!
(Why did I forget... Because of the festival today, there's a <color=#GF_TIPS_116>temporary schedule</color> for tourists!)
Normally we'd have to hurry, but we still have some time before today's last ferry.
You must be upset after going through something so terrible. Well, just calm down for now.
There are monsters wandering around outside, right? If we act in a panic, we'll get found.
That... might be true, but if we miss the ferry...!
I understand how you feel. But "haste makes waste." Let's calm down for now.
Well... if Alain insists.
Hahaha! This might be the first time I've seen the usually calm Shinpei so flustered.
You're so carefree, Alain. But thanks to that, I was able to calm down.
Let's rest here for a while as we wait to hear from Sou and the others.
Yeah, I'm fine with that.
Then, let's take your last order again. What do you two want to drink?
Huh? You were serious about the drinks?
Of course. A warm drink is the best thing for the soul.
Then I'll have milk tea.
Alright, I'll put in as much milk and sugar as I can.
What about you, Shinpei?
Um, I'll have coffee.
Got it. I'll use my special beans.
You had something like that?
It's the usual beans. I always serve my special ones.
It's all in how you say it.
(Finally... I feel like I've regained just a little bit of composure. It's thanks to Alain.)
How is it, have you calmed down?
Yeah, thanks, Alain.
No messages. ...From Tokiko or from Sou-kun.
Did you get separated from those two?
Yeah... When we were running away, there were so many people and it got super chaotic.
Shin-chan, I'll email Tokiko and the others telling them to come here too.
No, since we're planning to escape by ferry, it's better to tell them to head to the port.
If they're closer to the port than here, coming here would just be unnecessary travel.
Ah, right.
We can meet up at the port, or even just meet up on the mainland.
Alright, I'll go to the restroom before we start moving.
Dad, you're so laid back in this situation.
Haha…
My phone hasn't gotten any calls either...
(Where are you guys, Sou, Toki-chan...)
…Hey, Shin-chan.
What?
What on earth is going to happen to us?
I don't want anyone else to end up like Onee-chan again.
I wonder if they're safe. Tokiko... and Sou-kun...
Maybe they're already…
Mio, you're overthinking.
Ah... sorry. I shouldn't be saying things like that.
It'll be okay. I'll protect you, Mio.
...Thanks.
Um, Shin-chan. Can I... ask you something weird?
Something weird?
Um, is it okay if I go change clothes?
Change clothes...?
This outfit is really hard to run in. I figured regular clothes would be better.
Ah, yeah, I guess so.
But why go out of your way to ask me?
Because…
I thought you liked this yukata, Shin-chan.
…What!?
Was I wrong? I felt like you were staring at me more than usual during the festival, though.
W-Was I? I don't think I was consciously staring or anything, but...
S-Sorry, I said something weird! I'll go change real quick!
(Was I really staring that much...)
(I feel kind of restless. Maybe I should clean up the cups.)
(Even if we're escaping from here, it doesn't feel right to just leave them...)
…What!?
(On the kitchen floor... a black stain in the shape of a person...)
You've gotta be kidding me...
(No, it's not a joke. I want to believe my eyes are playing tricks on me, but there's no mistake!)
(This is the mark left behind when a Shadow copies a person!)
(If someone was copied by a Shadow here... There's only one person it could be.)
Damn it...!
Eek!? Wh-Who is it!?

It's me.
Mio, have you changed yet?
Not yet, but...
Shin-chan, did something happen? You have such a scary look on your face.
Shh... don't speak so loudly. We're getting out of here right now.
Huh, why? What's with the sudden change?
The Alain from earlier was a Shadow. It's dangerous if we stay here.
